texto: I don't care anymore, don't you understand that? I am doing what I am doing because I must do it. And when everything ends my ultimate reward is that I end with it, because I cannot stand to be a part of a creation that did what it did to you.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Matthew Head que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “I don't care anymore, don't you understand that? I am doing what I am doing because I must do it.…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, crucial, emotional, com foco em termino e emotional.
